response.justification: Maria Rodriguez has a technically credible 15+ year career spanning full-stack, embedded, and high-throughput systems, but she critically lacks the core competencies this Principal role demands. There is no evidence of experimentation platforms, A/B testing infrastructure, feature flagging, telemetry pipelines, or statistical analysis for experiment quality — which are the defining technical requirements. Her seniority trajectory aligns with Staff/Senior IC rather than Principal IC6, and the resume shows no demonstrated cross-organizational technical leadership, growth engineering experience, or track record of translating ambiguous business goals into measurable, multi-team engineering systems.
strengths: Polyglot engineering background (JavaScript/TypeScript, C, C++, C#, Java, DLang) satisfies the language breadth requirements on paper
High-throughput distributed systems experience at Dunnhumby — millions of HTTP requests per second with low-latency async I/O — demonstrates real-world scale
Recent AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling work (MCP frameworks, agentic workflows) shows adaptability to emerging technical domains
concerns: Zero experimentation or A/B testing platform experience — the role's central technical requirement is entirely absent from the resume
No telemetry, metrics infrastructure, or statistical/experimental analysis background; growth measurement and data aptitude are non-negotiable for this position
No demonstrated Principal-level scope: no evidence of cross-team influence, owning multi-workstream initiatives, or shaping engineering strategy beyond individual team boundaries
